image_prompt: Create a premium editorial hero image for AI Tool Pick's review of Chatbase. The image must visibly include the actual product name and actual tool name 'Chatbase' on a laptop or app interface. Make it recognisably about this exact product, not a generic AI dashboard. Show the product-specific concept: AI chatbot builder and customer support dashboard with the Chatbase product name visible. Use the site's premium dark, cream and orange visual style, realistic SaaS dashboard details, clean composition, no generic abstract blobs, no random brand names.
